title: Fig. 3. A–B in Revision of Xiphentedon Risbec, 1957 and Colpixys Waterston, 1916 (Hymenoptera, Eulophidae), with descriptions of new species from the Afrotropics
author: Gumovsky, Alex
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 3. A–B. Apleurotropis lacteicoxa (Girault, 1915), ♀ (NHMUK). A. Anterior part of mesosoma. B. Enlarged area arrowed in Fig. A. C–D. Pleurotroppopsis podagrica (Waterston, 1925), ♀ (NHMUK). C. Head and anterior part of mesosoma. D. Enlarged area arrowed in Fig. C. E. Chrysocharis prodice (Walker, 1839), lateral panel of pronotum (used for SEM). F. Achrysocharoides zwoelferi (Delucchi, 1954) (used for SEM), lateral panel of pronotum. Abbreviations: dsh = dorsal expansion of pronotum (virtual pronotal shoulder); lpl = lateral pronotal plica; or = orifices; pcr = pronotal carina on lateral panel of pronotum.
